issues.title: Brand-linked FDA recall
issues.short: FDA investigated recalled apple cinnamon pouches linked to elevated lead and chromium.

evidence.summary: FDA investigation of WanaBana, Schnucks, and Weis apple cinnamon pouches for elevated lead and chromium.

issues.title: Elevated lead in ground cinnamon
issues.short: FDA found elevated lead in multiple ground cinnamon products and advised consumers to stop using listed products.

evidence.summary: FDA public health alert for listed ground cinnamon products with elevated lead levels.

issues.title: FDA illness investigation and recall
issues.short: FDA warned consumers not to eat Diamond Shruumz products after illnesses, hospitalizations, and a recall.

evidence.summary: FDA investigation of illnesses linked to Diamond Shruumz products; all flavors recalled.

issues.title: E. coli outbreak linked to onions
issues.short: FDA linked an E. coli O157:H7 outbreak to recalled yellow onions served on McDonald's Quarter Pounders.

evidence.summary: FDA reported 104 illnesses, 34 hospitalizations, and 1 death in the Quarter Pounder onion outbreak.

issues.title: E. coli outbreak linked to organic carrots
issues.short: FDA linked recalled organic whole and baby carrots supplied by Grimmway Farms to an E. coli outbreak.

evidence.summary: FDA reported 48 illnesses, 20 hospitalizations, and 1 death in the organic carrots outbreak.

issues.title: Inorganic arsenic above action level
issues.short: FDA enforcement data lists multiple apple juice brands recalled for inorganic arsenic above the action level.

evidence.summary: FDA enforcement report F-1795-2024 for apple juice with inorganic arsenic above action level.

issues.short: FDA enforcement data lists Quaker bars and cereal/granola products recalled for potential Salmonella.

issues.title: Undeclared milk allergen
issues.short: FDA enforcement data lists Lay's potato chips recalled because milk was not declared on the label.
